/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -O2 -g -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,-soname,liblibsegwayrmp.so -o /home/4_fri/bwi_ros2/src/libsegwayrmp/libsegwayrmp/lib/liblibsegwayrmp.so CMakeFiles/libsegwayrmp.dir/src/segwayrmp.cc.o CMakeFiles/libsegwayrmp.dir/src/impl/rmp_io.cc.o CMakeFiles/libsegwayrmp.dir/src/impl/rmp_ftd2xx.cc.o CMakeFiles/libsegwayrmp.dir/src/impl/rmp_serial.cc.o  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Widgets.so.5.15.3 /home/4_fri/bwi_ros2/serial/build/libserial.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_system.so.1.74.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_thread.so.1.74.0 /home/4_fri/bwi_ros2/src/libsegwayrmp/libsegwayrmp/ftd2xx/linux/x64/libftd2xx.a -ldl -lrt -lpthread /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Gui.so.5.15.3 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Core.so.5.15.3 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_atomic.so.1.74.0
